expectations.text: A trace file exists in traces/ with 'iran-war' or 'gas-price' in the filename
expectations.evidence: File exists at with_skill/outputs/traces/trace.md, session_id contains 'iran-war-gas-price'

expectations.text: The trace file starts with valid YAML frontmatter delimited by --- lines
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-14: YAML frontmatter with --- delimiters, all fields present

expectations.text: YAML frontmatter contains session_id, date, objective, and status fields
expectations.evidence: session_id: 2026-03-20-iran-war-gas-price-impact-analysis, date: 2026-03-20, objective: Iran war gas price impact analysis, status: complete

expectations.text: YAML frontmatter status is 'complete' (not 'in-progress') after finalization
YAML frontmatter contains numeric totals: total_duration_min > 0, total_tokens > 0, steps_success > 0
The trace contains at least 3 step entries (### ✅ Step: or ### ❌ Error:)
expectations.evidence: 5 step entries: Load and inspect, Identify most impacted, Regional patterns, Statistical outliers, Pre-war vs war dynamics

expectations.text: Each step entry has at minimum: Action, Decision, and Result fields
expectations.evidence: All 5 steps have Action, Decision, and Result fields

expectations.text: At least 2 step entries include an Execution block with Tools and Duration fields
expectations.evidence: All 5 steps have Execution blocks with Tools and Duration

expectations.text: The trace contains at least one Phase header (## Phase:)
expectations.evidence: Two phase headers: Phase: Data Loading, Phase: Exploratory Analysis

expectations.text: A Session Summary section exists with Key decisions, Open questions, What went well, and What went wrong
expectations.evidence: Session Summary on line 109 has all 5 fields including Suggested next steps

expectations.text: A Session Totals section (## 📊 Session Totals) exists with Duration, Total tokens, Steps counts
expectations.evidence: Session Totals on line 131 with all required fields

expectations.text: The trace captures actual analysis findings (mentions states, regions, or price data)
expectations.evidence: Mentions Hawaii ($1.05), California ($1.01), Kentucky (31.0%), regional rankings, -0.777 correlation

expectations.text: Emoji status indicators are used (✅ for success, ❌ for errors if any)
expectations.evidence: All 5 steps use ✅ prefix, 2 insights use 💡 prefix
